title: Flexible Work Policy
text: Remote work eligibility is covered by the Flexible Work Policy. Employees need manager approval.

title: External AI Tool Use
text: External AI tools require project owner approval before confidential data may be entered.

title: Incident Retention
text: Incident records are retained for two years after closure unless legal review requires longer retention.

title: Travel Reimbursement
text: Travel receipts must be submitted within thirty days and are unrelated to AI tool approval.

title: Hardware Support
text: Hardware replacement requests are handled by the support desk and do not affect incident retention.
